chunks.text: ORDER IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 232 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.692/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Judge ARBROHI
